query:
SELECT a.id, a.clientId, a.scheduledDate, a.status, c.name as clientName 
FROM appointments a 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id 
WHERE a.scheduledDate IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY a.scheduledDate DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT a.id, a.clientId, a.scheduledDate, a.status, c.name as clientName 
FROM appointments a 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id 
WHERE a.scheduledDate IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY a.scheduledDate DESC 
LIMIT 20;
